channel.title: 網路 - category - 隨手筆記
channel.description: 網路 - category - 隨手筆記

item.title: Aqua-Sim NS3.29 安裝
item.description: Aquasim-ng installation, to install it download the files from zheng peng’s wiki 1 wget http://hudson.ccny.cuny.edu/download/aquasim-ng.tgz after you download it, you can try as below: Pyviz issue in this version 3.29 ref here AttributeError: ‘gi.repository.GooCanvas’ object has no attribute ‘LineDash’ line_dash=GooCanvas.LineDash() cange to line_dash=GooCanvas.CanvasLineDash.newv() Aqua-sim 是一

item.title: ACL Packet Tracert Cisco CLI
item.description: 提供的檔案 簡報 Final Exam(6.0).pkt 要求 切網段 順序 1 2 3 4 int vlan2 vlan3 vlan4 R1 切台數 64 32 16 8 網段頭 80.0 80.64 80.96 80.112 網段尾 80.63 80.95 80.111 80.119 遮罩 255.192 255.224 255.240 255.248 設定 IP 子網段設定 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 [Router]$confi Configuring from
